title: triplophyllum perpilosum
intro: Triplophyllum perpilosum, also known as the hairy triplophyllum or hairy triplophyllum fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Triplophyllum perpilosum are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Triplophyllum perpilosum is often used in infusions or teas, and is also used to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
